package rulecoverage

func PositiveRouteGroupsCreatedInsideHandlers() string {
    ruleID := "route_groups_created_inside_handlers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Code that constructs or mutates route groups outside the startup router layer."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
